title: Main Dashboard - Step Display & Progress
description: Primary screen showing real-time step count and daily goal progress with interactive controls

title: Insights & Analytics - Trend Visualization
description: Historical data display with charts showing weekly/monthly trends and achievement metrics

title: Streak Tracking - Consecutive Day Achievements
description: Visual representation of consecutive goal achievement days with calendar view

title: Settings & Preferences - User Configuration
description: Comprehensive settings screen for adjusting goals, units, notifications, theme, privacy

title: Water Reminder - Hydration Tracking
description: Water intake reminder screen with customizable intervals and daily targets

title: Adjust Steps - Manual Step Entry
description: Interface for manual step count adjustments when sensor data is inaccurate

title: Data Sync & Backup - Cloud Integration
description: Cloud synchronization with Firebase, backup creation, and sync history management

title: Onboarding Flow - First-Time Setup
description: Complete new user flow with permissions, goal setup, and preference initialization

title: Debug Panel - Development Tools
description: Internal debugging utilities for testing and troubleshooting

title: About & Feedback - App Information
description: Version info, developer contact, feedback submission, and feature requests

title: Permissions Request - Sensor Access
description: Request and handle physical activity permissions for step counting

title: Goal Setting - Daily Target Configuration
description: Set and modify daily step goals with validation and progress tracking

title: Notification Management - Alert System
description: Configure push notifications for goals, reminders, and achievements

title: Theme Customization - UI Personalization
description: Switch between light/dark themes and customize app appearance

title: Data Export - Health Data Sharing
description: Export step data in various formats (CSV, JSON) for external analysis

title: Offline Mode - Local Data Storage
description: Continue tracking steps without internet connection and sync when online

title: Health Integration - Samsung Health/Google Fit
description: Sync with third-party health platforms and import historical data

title: Achievement Badges - Gamification
description: Display earned badges and milestones with unlock animations

title: Social Sharing - Progress Sharing
description: Share achievements and progress on social media platforms

title: Emergency Contacts - Safety Features
description: Configure emergency contacts and safety monitoring features

title: Language & Localization - Multi-language Support
description: Support multiple languages and regional formatting preferences

title: Accessibility Features - Inclusive Design
description: Screen reader support, high contrast mode, and gesture navigation

title: Battery Optimization - Power Management
description: Optimize sensor usage for better battery life and performance

title: Privacy Controls - Data Protection
description: GDPR compliance, data deletion, and privacy settings management

title: App Update Flow - Version Management
description: Handle app updates, migration, and feature announcements

title: Crash Reporting - Error Handling
description: Report crashes and errors with detailed diagnostics
